keys.meta_description: Fast onboarding with essentials for people, spend, and billing—no enterprise shelfware.
keys.features_0_description: Cash, people, and tasks first on day one.
keys.features_1_description: Templates for first payroll and close.
keys.features_2_description: Reminders and simple runs as patterns repeat.
keys.sections_0_body: Growing teams need ERP outcomes without a squad.
keys.sections_1_body: Expense, eInvoice, and people ops on one spine.
keys.sections_2_body: Mechanical follow-up without the founder as workflow.
keys.faq_0_q: How fast can a small team get started?
keys.faq_0_a: Most SMB teams are live within a week. The platform ships with sensible defaults for payroll, expense approval, and leave routing that work without customisation.
keys.faq_1_q: Is the Basic plan enough for a 5-person team?
keys.faq_1_a: Yes. The Basic plan includes accounting, HRMS, CRM, and email support—everything a small team needs to run clean books and manage people.
keys.faq_2_q: Can we migrate data from QuickBooks, Xero, or Autocount?
keys.faq_2_a: Yes. We provide structured import tools and migration support. Chart of accounts, employee records, and historical transactions can be mapped and imported.
keys.faq_3_q: Can we start small and expand?
keys.faq_3_a: Yes. Turn on modules as you grow—HR, finance, analytics, and workflow blocks scale together.
keys.faq_4_a: Use the Pricing page for tiers; Enterprise adds SLA, scale, and governance options.
keys.faq_5_q: How do I get a demo?
keys.faq_5_a: Use Talk to sales or Book demo from the header—our team can align Automation and Scheduler to your process.
keys.faq_6_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
keys.faq_7_a: Contact our team for a walkthrough tailored to your workflow.
